race.comment: FAST HARRY (8) peaked on the run late when taking on Hot And High and Nicciana first-up from a spell. He lost no admirers there and he's unbeaten second-up. Pike remains with him and with plenty of improvement expected second-up, he can get back to winning ways. LIKE CLOCKWORK (15) bolted in first-up as a $1.55 fav and has been given close to no chance her past couple. Her splits last start from the back were superb and getting out to 1400m should suit. Hopefully she can sit a little closer this time around and she can go to the next level now. GI GI POPS (14) can give them something to chase from the front. AWESOME BOY (6) won't be far away.
